notes_md:
**mãi** means *forever* or *for a very long time*. It gives the feeling of something continuing without an end.

It usually goes after the verb to show long duration: waiting, remembering, loving, etc. It can also mean “keep on / again and again” depending on context.


Close friends: **hoài** (very similar, often “again and again”), and **luôn** (always) — but *mãi* feels longer, more endless.
exampleSentencesTranslated: I will always remember you forever even if we are apart.
I want our friendship to last forever just like now.
I cannot stay here forever, I have to go home.
notes:
mãi means forever or for a very long time. It gives the feeling of something continuing without an end.

It usually goes after the verb to show long duration: waiting, remembering, loving, etc. It can also mean “keep on / again and again” depending on context.

Close friends: hoài (very similar, often “again and again”), and luôn (always) — but mãi feels longer, more endless.

definitions.vi: Mãi mãi; trong một thời gian dài.

example.vi: Tôi sẽ yêu bạn mãi mãi.

content.sentence: Tình yêu của họ sẽ tồn tại ___.

exampleSentences: Anh sẽ luôn nhớ em mãi dù chúng ta xa nhau.
Chị muốn tình bạn của mình mãi bền lâu như bây giờ.
Em không thể ở lại đây mãi, em phải về nhà thôi.
